table.style: border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; font-size: 11px; font-family: verdana; vertical-align: top;

tr.style: border: 2px #F0F0F0 solid; font-size: 11px; font-family: verdana; vertical-align: top

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px

a.title: Minimum and Maximum # of times the item can appear in the instance

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px

tr.style: border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck1.png)
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td: NASA Medical Requirements Integration Document for muscle strength assessment. Captures isokinetic and isometric strength data for spaceflight crew members.

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck11.png)

tr.td: Initial Value: string = MEDB 5.2 Muscle Strength Assessment

tr.style: border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: #F7F7F7

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck110.png)

tr.td:
Options: 1 option
Initial Value: Coding = NASA MRID Sponsor Organizations#exercise-physiology "Exercise Physiology"

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck110.png)

tr.td:
Options: 1 option
Initial Value: Coding = NASA MRID Medical Disciplines#bone-muscle-exercise "Bone/Muscle/Exercise"

tr.style: border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: #F7F7F7

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck110.png)

tr.td: Initial Value: string = To assess muscle strength using isokinetic dynamometry. Establish baseline and monitor for spaceflight-related muscle atrophy and strength loss.

tr.td: Initial Value: string = R+5 to R+7 days, R+30 days

tr.td:
Options: 1 option
Initial Value: Coding = NASA Medical Data Archive Systems#mmis "Medical Mission Information System"

valueString.value: The astronaut/crewmember subject of this medical requirement

description.value: NASA Medical Requirements Integration Document for muscle strength assessment. Captures isokinetic and isometric strength data for spaceflight crew members.

purpose.value: To assess pre- and postflight muscle strength using isokinetic and isometric testing to monitor for spaceflight-related muscle atrophy.

copyright.value: NASA Johnson Space Center - Medical Requirements Integration Documents (MRIDs) JSC28913

valueString.value: To assess muscle strength using isokinetic dynamometry. Establish baseline and monitor for spaceflight-related muscle atrophy and strength loss.
Peak torque, total work, average power for knee, ankle, trunk muscle groups
Isokinetic strength testing of major muscle groups including knee extensors/flexors, ankle plantar/dorsiflexors, and trunk extensors/flexors.
R+5 to R+7 days, R+30 days
